verdict: Fits SQLite staging/review purpose, not canonical promotion purpose.

checks.recording_id_integrity: All three files have complete Recording ID coverage and all IDs exist in SongDB_v2/recordings.csv.
checks.mood_event: 9672 rows; only 15 rows contain any nonblank tag suggestion. Suggested tokens mostly Last.fm genre descriptors, not controlled vocabulary.
checks.performance: 9672 rows; all Low confidence and all Source URL values are Generative Suggestion. BPM/key nonblank values exactly duplicate existing SongDB_v2 values; default tuning/capo/difficulty/instrumentation applies to every row and should not be promoted.
checks.external_links: 29016 rows; complete 3-site search coverage but 0 verified URLs. Suitable as search cache only.
checks.sqlite: Suitable for import as antigravity_* staging tables and review views. Do not overwrite recordings/external_links canonical tables.

recommended_jules_action: Import the three CSVs into SQLite staging tables only.
Create review views for nonblank tags, BPM/key suggestions, and external search URLs.
Mark external links as search_link_generated, not verified.
Do not update canonical recordings or external_links from this batch.
blocking_issues_for_promotion: Performance defaults are low-confidence generative placeholders.
Tag suggestions are sparse and not normalized to controlled vocabulary.
